exercises.code:
rows = [{"id": 1}, {"id": 2}]
shallow = rows[:]
shallow[0]["id"] = 99
print(rows[0]["id"])  # 99 shallow
import copy
deep = copy.deepcopy(rows)
deep[0]["id"] = 1
print(rows[0]["id"], deep[0]["id"])
